docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $94.04 FILED BY GOSSMAN, SANFORD I. AS TO DEFENDANT MA, KENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORIGINAL POS FILED AS TO KENNY MA AFTER TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-19-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-19-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CASE WILL BE HEARD AT 11:00 AM, IN ROOM 506. ORDER ENCLOSED.
DISMISSAL STRICKEN PURSUANT TO COURT ORDER
CON'T REQUEST FILED BY DEFT. SENT TO COURT FOR AN ORDER. $10 FEES PAID BY CASH.
PLTF'S FILING:"RESPONSE TO ORDER OF JUNE 19, 2001 ISSUED BY COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN".
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-19-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-26-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CASE WILL BE HEARD AT 11:00 AM, IN ROOM 506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MA, KENNY DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PREFILING ORDER STATUTE, AFTER HAVING BEEN GIVEN OPPORTUNITY TO DO SO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
